test-case.name: SecondDemolish_OverwritesSnapshot
test-case.output: [Placement] Demolished 'power_line' at (0, 0). Refund=20 [Placement] Demolished 'power_line' at (1, 0). Refund=20

test-case.name: DeleteSlot_RemovesOnlyTarget
